challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should create a new p and div element at the end of your .daily-value element.
Your new p element should have the text Dietary Fiber 4g.
Your new p element should have the class attribute set to indent no-divider.
Your new div should have the class attribute set to divider.

description: Ispod vašeg poslednjeg p elementa, dodajte još jedan p element sa tekstom Dietary Fiber 4g. Dajte elementu p atribut/vrednost class neophodno da ga uvede i ukloni razdvajajuću ivicu. Zatim kreirajte separator ispod tog elementa p.
